name: Countess Griselda Guliano
description:
Worried about the her future and her daughter's she seeks aslyum on your court. Xhorn Emperor Saartex The Ravager had her husband arrested and executed with baseless acusations of treason and sequestered the fiefs and estates of the House Guliano. Desperate and afraid she is counting on you to provide a safe and better future for her and her daughter Anastasia.
Disclaimers:
Mentions of Trauma and Depression
creator: ShahShakuras
